name: Cumi-Cumi Isi (Stuffed Squid)
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 1:20
Clean the squid by washing under cold running water and drying thoroughly.
Remove the skin from the snapper (ensuring no bones remain) and cut the meat into small pieces.
Crush the garlic.
Beat the egg whites lightly, add the snapper and garlic, and season with salt, white pepper, and nutmeg. Stir to blend thoroughly, then stuff the mixture into the squid.
Chop the shallots, chiles, candlenuts, and lemon grass. Sauté in very hot oil for three to four minutes.
Add the coconut milk and bring to a boil. Lower the heat and add the stuffed squid. Allow to simmer until the squid is very tender, approximately one hour. Transfer to a serving dish and pour the sauce on top.
